  "applicantAgreements": [
    {
      "targets": [
        "constConsentEn_v10"
      ],
      "content": "# Notification of Processing of Personal Data\n\nThe personal data you provide in connection with the identity verification process will be processed by:\n\n(i) **The Company** - the organisation with which you intend to establish a business relationship after completing the\nKYC process. The Company will process your personal data in line with its internal policies and applicable legal\nrequirements;\n\n(ii) **Sumsub Group of Companies** (hereinafter referred to as the \u201cService Provider\u201d or \u201cSumsub\u201d) which will process\nyour personal data on behalf of the Company to perform identity verification services and for its own separate purposes.\nFor more information, including the identity and contact details of Sumsub, please refer\nto [the Privacy Notice](https://sumsub.com/privacy-notice-service/).\n\n1. Your name and other means of identification for the purposes of obtaining this Notification shall be established in\n   the course of the processing of your personal data carried out in accordance with this Notification.\n\n2. The processing shall be done for the purposes of the Company and may include matters of compliance with applicable\n   AML/CFT, anti-fraud laws and regulations, age restrictions acts and/or other laws and regulations and/or the Company\n   customer due diligence procedures in accordance with the laws governing the intended business relationship.\n   The processing will also be carried out for other compatible purposes of the Service Provider acting as a separate\n   data controller. Such compatible purposes include service development, including training of AI models, fraud and\n   criminal activity prevention, the conduct of analytics as well as \u2018litigation hold\u2019 and statutory obligations of the Service Provider, and are\n   explained in detail in the Privacy Notice available [here](https://sumsub.com/privacy-notice-service/). Regarding the delegation of personal data processing by the Company:\n\n   3.1. The company details (including the address) of the Company, which is the Data Controller, have been provided to\n   you by the Company. Any orders, directions or instructions for processing, designation of the purposes of the\n   processing, determination of personal data subject to processing and other similar matters are the responsibility\n   of the Company.\n\n   3.2. The Company may entrust the processing of your personal data to data processors (e.g. Service Provider) through\n   which the Company collects and processes your data if it is necessary for the processing purposes as set out\n   above; the personal data may be disclosed to entities associated with Sumsub Group of Companies that are obliged\n   to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure the safety of the personal data to\n   achieve the purpose of the processing under this Notification. The Service Provider stores personal data in AWS\n   Amazon or Google Cloud (depending on the requirements of the Company on the place of data storage).\n\n   3.3. Personal data may be disclosed to entities associated with the Service Provider to achieve the purpose of the\n   processing under this Notification. The Service Provider guarantees that such entities, as well as other data\n   processors to which it discloses personal data, implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to\n   ensure the safety of the personal data.\n\n4. Data processing methods\n\n   Personal data shall be processed by means of automated text extraction, verification of authenticity/validity and\n   other methods of automated processing of photos and scanned copies of documents.\n\n   This Notification covers the following processing activities: collection, recording, organisation, structuring,\n   storage, adaptation or alteration, retrieval, consultation, use, disclosure by transmission to the Company or Service\n   Provider and data processors, dissemination or otherwise making available for the performance of a task carried out\n   in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority, transfer (including cross-border transfer, where\n   necessary), alignment or combination, restriction, erasure and destruction.\n\n   The personal data may be checked in multiple databases, including International Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs),\n   Sanctions, Country-Specific Sanctions Lists and other \u2018watch\u2019 lists. It may also be reviewed in media information\n   sources.\n\n   Whenever a transfer of personal data outside the EEA is carried out, the Company and Sumsub implement appropriate\n   safeguards as set out in the applicable laws by transferring on the basis of the EU adequacy decisions (or U

**Body**: {
  "navigation" : {
    "entries" : [ {
      "stepType" : "welcomeWithAgreement",
      "current" : true
    }, {
      "stepType" : "idDocSet",
      "idDocSetType" : "IDENTITY",
      "captureParams" : {
        "inputType" : "docapture",
        "docapture" : {
          "captureMode" : "manualAndAuto",
          "uploaderMode" : "always"
        }
      }
    }, {
      "stepType" : "idDocSet",
      "idDocSetType" : "SELFIE",
      "captureParams" : {
        "inputType" : "liveness"
      }
    }, {
      "stepType" : "verificationInProgress"
    }, {
      "stepType" : "verificationCompleted"
    } ],
    "canGoForward" : true
  },
  "step" : {
    "stepType" : "welcomeWithAgreement",
    "completed" : true,
    "canShowSplashScreen" : true,
    "agreement" : {
      "agreementDescription" : "agreements.privacyPolicy",
      "agreements" : [ {
        "titleKey" : "agreements.titleKey.default",
        "description" : "agreements.privacyPolicy",
        "agreement" : {
          "targets" : [ "constConsentEn_v10" ],
          "content" : "# Notification of Processing of Personal Data\n\nThe personal data you provide in connection with the identity verification process will be processed by:\n\n(i) **The Company** - the organisation with which you intend to establish a business relationship after completing the\nKYC process. The Company will process your personal data in line with its internal policies and applicable legal\nrequirements;\n\n(ii) **Sumsub Group of Companies** (hereinafter referred to as the “Service Provider” or “Sumsub”) which will process\nyour personal data on behalf of the Company to perform identity verification services and for its own separate purposes.\nFor more information, including the identity and contact details of Sumsub, please refer\nto [the Privacy Notice](https://sumsub.com/privacy-notice-service/).\n\n1. Your name and other means of identification for the purposes of obtaining this Notification shall be established in\n   th

**Body**: {
  "navigation" : {
    "entries" : [ {
      "stepType" : "welcomeWithAgreement",
      "current" : true
    }, {
      "stepType" : "idDocSet",
      "idDocSetType" : "IDENTITY",
      "captureParams" : {
        "inputType" : "docapture",
        "docapture" : {
          "captureMode" : "manualAndAuto",
          "uploaderMode" : "always"
        }
      }
    }, {
      "stepType" : "idDocSet",
      "idDocSetType" : "SELFIE",
      "captureParams" : {
        "inputType" : "liveness"
      }
    }, {
      "stepType" : "verificationInProgress"
    }, {
      "stepType" : "verificationCompleted"
    } ],
    "canGoForward" : true
  },
  "step" : {
    "stepType" : "welcomeWithAgreement",
    "completed" : false,
    "canShowSplashScreen" : true,
    "agreement" : {
      "agreementDescription" : "agreements.privacyPolicy",
      "agreements" : [ {
        "titleKey" : "agreements.titleKey.default",
        "description" : "agreements.privacyPolicy",
        "agreement" : {
          "targets" : [ "constConsentEn_v10" ],
          "content" : "# Notification of Processing of Personal Data\n\nThe personal data you provide in connection with the identity verification process will be processed by:\n\n(i) **The Company** - the organisation with which you intend to establish a business relationship after completing the\nKYC process. The Company will process your personal data in line with its internal policies and applicable legal\nrequirements;\n\n(ii) **Sumsub Group of Companies** (hereinafter referred to as the “Service Provider” or “Sumsub”) which will process\nyour personal data on behalf of the Company to perform identity verification services and for its own separate purposes.\nFor more information, including the identity and contact details of Sumsub, please refer\nto [the Privacy Notice](https://sumsub.com/privacy-notice-service/).\n\n1. Your name and other means of identification for the purposes of obtaining this Notification shall be established in\n   t
